description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: Coverage is "Claims made". This means the Loss Event ([A.2.
.1.1.1.3.1 - Resilience Fund Policy Loss Events](9cb0c1c3-269b-433b-ac03-de4b0bec43fb)) must occur after the Effective Date ([A.2.

The facts and circumstances that originated the Loss Event may have occurred in the past for a maximum period of up to twenty-four (24) months before the date representing the later of (a) the Effective Date and (b) the date the Beneficiary is first eligible for coverage under this Artifact (the "Retroactivity Period").

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
